📍 Bribie Island

Instagram Inquiry

I’m Kimberley, the heart behind The Roamed Collective. With the support of my team, I’ve created a space where stories are honoured and memories are preserved with genuine connection. Photography, to me, is more than an image; it’s a moment held still, a chapter you can return to long after time has passed.

Every part of your journey, whether grand or beautifully ordinary, deserves to be captured with authenticity, warmth, and soul. Your story is unique, and it deserves care and intention.

From radiant maternity sessions and unforgettable proposals to heartfelt family portraits and the joyful chaos of pets, my approach is simple: be present, be patient, be real. I let your story unfold naturally, capturing the raw, unposed moments that reveal who you truly are.

Whether you’re celebrating love, welcoming new life, or pausing a fleeting season, it’s an honour to create imagery that feels meaningful, honest, and timeless. At The Roamed Collective, we don’t just take photos; we tell stories that last.

Let’s capture the magic, the emotion, and the beautifully imperfect moments you’ll treasure forever. Let’s create something unforgettable together.
